custom_css: @media (min-width: 768px) {/* 第一个 div（一般是图片） */ .wpbingo-about--single-banner .wpbingo-section__content > div:first-child {max-width: 60%; flex: 0 0 60%; } /* 第二个 div（一般是文字） */ .wpbingo-about--single-banner .wpbingo-section__content > div:last-child {max-width: 40%; flex: 0 0 40%; }}
about_single_banner_qkLyQ3.name: About Single banner

settings.title: Discover the ideal piece to match your style.
The Cerova collection pairs minimalist design with porcelain shades and subtle accents. Its soft glow brings calm elegance to modern interiors.
Available in a Pendant, Flush-Mount, and Wall Sconce
The Hanton collection blends industrial strength with clean, geometric forms. Each piece delivers bold lighting with a modern edge.
Available in a Pendant, Flush-Mount, and Wall Sconce
The Bravira collection features ribbed and bubbled glass for added texture and charm. Its warm glow enriches both classic and modern spaces.
Available in a Wall Sconce, Table Lamp, and Pendant Light
The Korvi collection embraces industrial character with strong metal forms and clean lines. Its bold presence adds depth and style to both indoor and outdoor spaces.
Available in Wall Sconce and Outdoor Fixture
The Glavira collection blends recycled glass with warm metal finishes. Its soft glow adds elegance and charm to modern interiors.
Available in a Pendant, Linear Chandelier, and Wall Sconce
The Luvora collection combines pleated linen shades with brass accents, offering a refined, farmhouse-inspired aesthetic. Its soft illumination enhances cozy interiors with timeless charm.
Available in a Floor Lamp, Wall Sconce, Flush Mount, and Pendant Light
The Wolvina collection features natural marble and sleek metal details, creating a minimalist yet sophisticated look. Its clean lines and subtle elegance suit contemporary spaces.
The Dumora collection blends linen and iron materials, delivering a vintage brass finish with a modern twist. Its versatile designs complement various interior styles.
Available in a Pendant Light and Flush Mount
